hero.title: Accelerate your product launch with
hero.subtitle: Connect directly with real Amazon buyers. Sellers get momentum, buyers get rewarded. The transparent, reliable way to build early traction.

howItWorks.title: Built for Growth
howItWorks.subtitle: A double-sided marketplace that works for everyone

seller.title: For Sellers
seller.description: Launch new products with confidence. Get the initial reviews you need to rank higher and start driving organic sales.
features: List products and set reimbursement amounts
Track review progress and completion rates
Only pay for completed, verified reviews

buyer.title: For Buyers
buyer.description: Discover great new products and get reimbursed for your honest feedback. Shop on Amazon like you normally do.
features: Browse a curated marketplace of products
Buy on Amazon, post a review, get paid
Fast reimbursements directly to your account

secure.title: Secure & Verified
secure.description: Our internal team verifies every purchase and review before processing reimbursements, ensuring platform integrity.

anonymous.title: Anonymized Feedback
anonymous.description: Sellers receive valuable feedback while buyer identities remain completely protected and anonymous.

analytics.title: Actionable Analytics
analytics.description: Track your campaign progress, view completion rates, and manage your budget all from one powerful dashboard.

buyer.welcome_subtitle: Browse available products, claim deals, and earn reimbursements for your reviews.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse available products, claim deals, and start earning reimbursements.
marketplace.feature_browse: Browse available products from active seller campaigns
marketplace.feature_filter: Filter by category, region, reimbursement %, and price range
marketplace.feature_sort: Sort by newest, highest reimbursement, or most popular
marketplace.feature_product_card: Product detail card with image, title, price, reimbursement amount, and seller rating
marketplace.feature_amazon_link: "View on Amazon" external link for each product
marketplace.feature_claim_cta: "Claim Product" CTA button → opens modal to upload order screenshot as proof
marketplace.feature_search: Search bar for keyword or ASIN search

claims.title: My Claims
claims.subtitle: Track your claimed products, upload review proof, and monitor reimbursement status.
claims.feature_list: Table / cards listing all claims with full status pipeline (Order Submitted → Review Pending → Review Submitted → Approved → Reimbursed)
claims.feature_status_filter: Status filter tabs or dropdown to narrow results
claims.feature_upload_review: Upload review proof (review URL or screenshot)
claims.feature_timeline: Claim detail expansion with timeline / activity log
claims.feature_payout: Reimbursement amount and payout status per claim
claims.feature_amazon_link: Direct link to the product on Amazon
claims.feature_cancel: Cancel claim action (if still in early stages)

account.title: Profile & Earnings
account.subtitle: Track your performance, manage bank details, and view your earnings.
account.feature_health: Profile health stats: on-time submission rate, total earnings, claims completed, approval rate
account.feature_bank: Bank details management: add, edit, or remove bank account for reimbursements
account.feature_activity: Account activity log (last login, recent actions)

seller.welcome_subtitle: Manage your campaigns and track incoming reviews.
seller.create_campaign_desc: Launch a new product review campaign.
seller.campaigns_page_desc: Manage all your active and past product campaigns.
seller.reviews_page_desc: Monitor and verify incoming reviews from buyers.
seller.billing_page_desc: Manage your payment methods and view past transactions.

dashboard.review_velocity_desc: Number of completed reviews over time across all campaigns.
dashboard.no_data: No data available for this period.
dashboard.no_active_campaigns: No active campaigns found. Create one to see progress here.

no_campaigns.title: No campaigns found
no_campaigns.desc: Get started by creating your first campaign.

detail.title: Campaign Details
detail.no_guidelines: No guidelines specified for this campaign.
detail.help_desc: Modifying guidelines or targets for active campaigns requires platform approval to ensure fairness to existing claimants.

wizard.title: Create New Campaign
wizard.desc: Follow the steps to setup your product review campaign.
wizard.asin_help: Enter the 10-character Amazon Standard Identification Number.
wizard.target_desc: How many units would you like to distribute for this campaign?
wizard.reimbursement_desc: What percentage of the product price will you reimburse to the buyer?
wizard.pro_tip: Pro Tip: Higher Reimbursements Convert Faster
wizard.pro_tip_desc: Campaigns offering 100% reimbursement tend to fulfill their review quotas 3x faster than campaigns offering partial reimbursements.
wizard.guidelines_desc: What specific aspects of the product do you want the reviewer to focus on? Provide clear and concise instructions.

tos.title: Amazon TOS Compliance Notice
tos.desc: Please ensure your guidelines strictly comply with Amazon's Terms of Service. Do not ask for guaranteed positive reviews or explicitly instruct the buyer not to mention the rebate.

summary.guaranteed_desc: Your campaign will be published immediately to our verified reviewer pool. Funds are held securely until reviews are verified.

reviews.no_reviews: No reviews found matching your criteria.
reviews.not_posted: Review not yet posted or date unavailable
reviews.no_text_provided: No review text provided by the buyer.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard, track your reviews, and manage your account seamlessly.
auth.feature1_desc: Track the performance of your listings and monitor early review impacts.
auth.feature2_desc: Experience highly secure authentication powered by advanced standards.
auth.feature3_desc: Get anytime access to our specialized support teams for sellers and buyers.
auth.enter_details: Enter your details below to access your account
auth.buyer_signup_title: Get Paid for Your Honest Opinion
auth.buyer_signup_subtitle: Join SalesDuo as a buyer to discover amazing new products, try them out, and get reimbursed for leaving insightful reviews.
auth.buyer_feature1_desc: Get exclusive access to pre-launch and high-quality items.
auth.buyer_feature2_desc: Submit your review and get your promised cashback instantly.
auth.buyer_feature3_desc: High-quality reviews earn you trust and more premium product offers.
auth.seller_signup_title: Boost Your Launch with Early Reviews
auth.seller_signup_subtitle: Join SalesDuo as a seller to list your products, connect with verified buyers, and acquire authentic reviews legally.
auth.seller_feature1_desc: Access our curated list of trusted buyers ready to review.
auth.seller_feature2_desc: Our platform adheres to marketplace guidelines for safe reviewing.
auth.seller_feature3_desc: Dashboard to monitor reimbursements and review completion rates.
auth.we_sent_code: We sent a verification code to
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Regain access to your SalesDuo account securely and continue managing your reviews and reimbursements.
auth.forgot_feature1_desc: Your account safety is our priority with multi-step verification.
auth.forgot_feature2_desc: Get back to your dashboard in minutes with automated recovery.
auth.forgot_feature3_desc: Need help? Our team is always here to assist with account access.
auth.forgot_description: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.
auth.we_sent_reset_code: We sent a password reset code to
auth.new_password_description: Your new password must be different from previously used passwords.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Secure your account with a strong new password to continue using SalesDuo.
auth.reset_feature1_desc: Use a combination of letters, numbers, and symbols for better security.
auth.reset_feature2_desc: Log in immediately after your new password is saved.

validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.password_min_6: Password must be at least 6 characters

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle_buyer: Just a few more details to set up your buyer account.
onboarding.subtitle_seller: Just a few more details to set up your seller account.
onboarding.amazon_profile_help_1: To find your profile URL, go to
onboarding.amazon_profile_help_2: while logged into your Amazon account.
onboarding.fail: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
onboarding.buyer_split_subtitle: Complete your profile to start requesting high-quality products for free or at massive discounts.
onboarding.buyer_feature_1_desc: Link your profile so sellers can verify your review quality.
onboarding.buyer_feature_2_desc: Browse our marketplace and request items you actually want.
onboarding.seller_split_subtitle: Provide your company details to start connecting with top-tier reviewers and boosting your sales.
onboarding.seller_feature_1_desc: Add your company name to build trust with our reviewer community.
onboarding.seller_feature_2_desc: Create targeted review campaigns in minutes and watch your rankings climb.
